title: Actions & Such
description: This modpack tries to remake the Bedrock exclusive texture pack, Actions and Stuff on Java Edition!
body:
**Actions & Such** tries to remake the **Bedrock** exclusive texture pack, **Actions & Stuff** made by **Orville Studios** on **Java Edition**!

**This pack adds new textures, animations, visuals: with mods, 3D items using resource packs, new sounds using mods and shaders!** _just remove Visual Effects + when using shaders_

**PLEASE IF YOU EVER USE THIS MODPACK FOR A YOUTUBE VIDEO OR ANY TYPE OF SOCIAL MEDIA POST, CREDIT ME**

Curseforge Version: _soon_

Video:
_coming soon_

This modpack is inspired by **Enderverse** and **Fresh and Smooth**!

Check out the actual **Actions & Stuff** pack!
[Actions & Stuff](https://www.minecraft.net/en-us/marketplace/pdp/oreville-studios/actions--stuff-1.7/61c7a786-d7ad-49e0-a710-817121cd9795)

Some mods or texture packs that are not in the Modrinth page!
[Pumpkin](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/action-s-amp-stuff-pumpkin-java-no-blur)
